title: Just Trailers
description:
the most accurate trailers modpack.
dont believe me ? 
try it.
body:
![JustTrailers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36cd0293657854eab4a14d30748a0542d99210c3_0.webp)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![What Is JustTrailers?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3ce57943dbe6310b8ed426cfa273ab2a7edd3d9.png)

its a project , trying to make minecraft looks like the trailers.

why?
While all trailers modpacks are similar

in this modpack I chose to stay away from coping as much as possible and focus only on being as identical as possible to the trailers,

you well get one the best trailers expeariance this modpack is not very big or small you will run it easly with no issus and you will enjoy this work with the amazing views in all of the dimensions you can make your own ideas or showcase your work in this modpack ,,, the BEST trailers expeariance ,,,

.
.
-
ive told you trailer soon
